# PDF to Image Generator — sender.ia

## What this app does
PDF to Image Generator is a free, browser-based tool that converts PDF pages into
high-quality JPG or PNG images. All processing happens client-side (no server upload).

## Key features
- Convert any PDF page or range to JPG or PNG
- Custom logo/watermark overlay with position, size, opacity, and drop shadow controls
- Output resolution: custom (px) or social media presets (1080x1080, 1920x1080, etc.)
- Download as individual files or ZIP/TAR.GZ package
- Supports public URLs and Google Drive public links
- Available in English and Spanish

## Author
Leo Aquiba Senderovsky — sender.ia
https://www.instagram.com/sender.ia/
https://pdf-to-image-generator.netlify.app/

## License
Free to use. No account required.
